thought.text: "forceSpillAll" is true so everything is spilled. But "missing spill slot for vreg" means somewhere spill slot isn't created for the vreg used in some operation. Let me look at the spill setup in EmitAsm:

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -n \"spill\\|spillSlot\\|missing spill\" task/5/EmitAsm.cpp | head -20", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Find spill handling"}
